content: Fix inspection date/time picker (calendar UI distortion + manual time entry)
Add supervisor assignment to Asset model and API endpoints
Restructure User Management page (department-first + role grouping + edit functionality)
Restructure Asset Registry (group by asset type + supervisor display + clickable asset history)
Update New Inspection page (group assets by type + clickable asset history)
Restructure Inspection History page (asset-wise + collapsible + latest-first)
Test all changes via screenshot tool
